LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO DEPOSIT SURPLIS FUNDS IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY COURT, TO BE HEARD ON JUNE 23, 2014 AT 9:30 AM. (SEE SFLR 8.10.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENTS ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'S MOTION ON ORDER TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS IS GRANTED. TRUSTEE SHALL DEPOSIT 164,210.92 WITH THE COURT AND BE DISCHARGED OF ANY FURTHER RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE DISBURSEMENT OF THE SALE PROCEEDS UPON SUCH DEPOSIT. DISTRIBUTION OF FUNDS IS SUBMITTED. PETITIONER TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Req. For Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott D. Schwartz, Esq. of Rust, Armenis & Schwartz, (415-765-5910), for Jeffrey Caluen and Alicia Chin-Caluen, Claimants and moving parties.
No appearance by Petitioner.

There having no opposition filed, Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows: Claimant Jeffrey Caluen and Alicia Chin-Caluen's Motion for Request for Distribution is GRANTED. See details in the scanned Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Ntc Of Mtn On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Finds
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Seth Harris, Esq. of McCarthy & Holthus, LLP, (619-955-1529), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL, for Quality Loan Service Corp.
Scott D. Schwartz, Esq. of Rust, Armenix & Schwartz, (415-765-5910), for Jeffrey Caluen, Claimant.

Hearing is held re distribution of funds. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'s Motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is GRANTED. Trustee shall deposit 164,210.92 with the Court and be discharged of any further responsibility for the disbursement of the sale proceeds upon such deposit. Distribution of funds is submitted. Petitioner to submit proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Finds
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Continued To Jun-23-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO DEPOSIT SURPLIS FUNDS is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on June 23, 2014 at 9:30 am. (See SFLR 8.10.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
